apple.notes: Education app; no UGC, unrestricted web, gambling, medical, sexual, or violent content; independent non-official disclaimer present; no non-exempt encryption identified in the release surface.

google.notes: Education app for adults/learners; ads declaration reviewed for the ad-supported Google Mobile Ads v1.0 posture with concrete AdMob app records, ATT/UMP consent disclosures, and 29 SEK Remove Ads non-consumable purchase copy; no government affiliation is claimed; no real-money gambling.

remainingCaveat: This records the local questionnaire review. Final console submission still depends on store records, credentials, generated builds, privacy review, owner approval, screenshots, and submission gates.
